description: Workflow automation hooks for dotclaude — skill routing, quality gates, context injection, and file protection

hooks.command: FILE=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty'); if [ -n "$FILE" ] && echo "$FILE" | grep -qE '\.md$'; then npx markdownlint-cli2 --fix "$FILE" 2>/dev/null; fi

GATE_PATTERN='review|debate|finding' GATE_MSG='Your findings must include file:line evidence for every issue. Please re-review and cite specific code locations.' ${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/hooks/task-gate.sh

GATE_PATTERN='dev-loop|explore|implement|review|fix|finding' GATE_MSG='Your output must include file:line evidence. Re-examine the code and cite specific locations.' ${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/hooks/task-gate.sh
GATE_PATTERN='respond|fix-thread|reply-thread' GATE_MSG='Your output must include file:line evidence. Cite the specific file and line number you fixed.' ${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/hooks/task-gate.sh

NUDGE_PATTERN='review-pr' NUDGE_CHECK_TASKS=1 NUDGE_MSG='You still have pending debate tasks. Please review your assigned teammate\'s findings and respond with Agree, Challenge, or Escalate per the debate protocol.' ${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/hooks/idle-nudge.sh

NUDGE_PATTERN='dev-loop' NUDGE_CHECK_TASKS=1 NUDGE_MSG='You have pending tasks. Please continue working on your assigned phase tasks and message the team lead when done.' ${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/hooks/idle-nudge.sh

NUDGE_PATTERN='respond' NUDGE_MSG='You are idle. Continue fixing your assigned threads and message the team lead when done. If blocked, message lead with: thread number, what you tried, and where you are stuck.' ${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/hooks/idle-nudge.sh

NUDGE_PATTERN='^debug-' NUDGE_MSG='You are idle. Continue your investigation and send findings to the team lead when done. If blocked, message the lead with: what you tried, what you found, and where you are stuck.' ${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/hooks/idle-nudge.sh
